title: Metroids for Cobblemon
description: An addon for Cobblemon that adds Metroids to your game
body:
### PLACE IN BOTH YOUR RESOURCEPACK FOLDER AND IN YOUR DATAPACK FOLDER

   This resource pack adds everyone's favorite brain sucking creatures from the stars into your Cobblemon experience. The Metroid's are BUG and FLYING bioweapon jelly creatures perfect for the whole family. They don't like the cold and tend to stay in deep warm climates.

### Currently Done:
- Basic Metroid Model With Shiny Textures
- Idle Animation
- Cry Animation
- Walking Animation
- Flying Animation
- Faint Animation
- "Shoulder" Mount Animation
- Adding Metroid Cry Sound Effect
- Some attack Animation

### Future Plans:
- Adding Metroid Evolution stages from Metroid 2
- Adding some more flavorful Animations
- Adding more Metroid friends
- Add "THE BABY"

### Location found: Rare in Caves, Common in Nether
### Type: BUG, FLYING
### Abilities:
- clear body
- heat proof
- _hidden:_ thermal exchange
### Level up moves : 
- LVL 1    growl
- LVL 1    leech life
- LVL 4    absorb
- LVL 8    double team
- LVL 12    bug bite
- LVL 15    bite
- LVL 18    refresh
- LVL 24    bounce
- LVL 28    signal beam
- LVL 32    crunch
- LVL 36    screech
- LVL 40    Lunge
- LVL 44    mega drain
- LVL 48    guillotine
- LVL 52    dragon rush
- LVL 56    recover
- LVL 60    giga drain
- LVL 70    outrage 
### Egg moves :
- egg:  disable
- egg:  attack order
- egg:  heal order
- egg:  defend order
- egg:  dragon dance
- egg:  head smash
